public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as wagon surgeon.
manner: Reads roads, loads, and people as one shared logistics problem rather than separate categories. In Nomdara Caravan, that reads as someone adaptable, mobile, and transactionally warm, always reading routes, people, and changing terms, and the habits of a wagon surgeon still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of wagon surgeon in and around Sheresh Relief Caravan, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Sheresh Relief Caravan workable through the obligations of wagon surgeon while managing the immediate pressure of route danger in Nomdara Caravan.
hidden_pressure: Must keep timing, safety, and route credibility aligned when any disruption threatens all three. Around Sheresh Relief Caravan, that usually means carrying route danger, whirlpool and weather risk, dependency on negotiated access without letting the role of wagon surgeon visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Issa Wheelwright will share route intelligence, hidden timing, or safer alternatives if the party proves useful under travel pressure.
Issa Wheelwright needs help reading a blocked path, escorting traffic, or reopening safe movement through Sheresh Relief Caravan.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Travel kit, route marks, and timing-focused movement signal that Issa Wheelwright lives by roads, passages, or convoy rhythm.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Sheresh Relief Caravan: roads, caravan nodes, docks, ferries, route desks, or loading seams
who_avoids_them: those who do not respect route discipline
